# Ramvas Gurukul

> Ramvas Gurukul is an India-based online coaching institute offering live, interactive Zoom classes for Class 8, 9 and 10 students across all subjects (Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English and Hindi), plus Class 11 & 12 (Physics, Chemistry, Maths) and programming courses. Founded and taught by Shivam Mishra (Shivam Sir), a B.Tech CSE graduate with 7+ years of teaching experience, it focuses on concept-based, NCERT-aligned learning rather than rote memorisation. A 100% free demo class is available with no commitment.

## Key facts

- **Name:** Ramvas Gurukul
- **Founder & lead tutor:** Shivam Mishra (Shivam Sir), B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering, 7+ years teaching experience
- **Primary focus:** Online coaching for **Class 8, 9 and 10** — all subjects (Maths, Science, Social Science, English, Hindi)
- **Also offered:** Class 11 & 12 (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics); Programming (C, C++, Python, Java, AI/ML)
- **Mode:** 100% online — live interactive classes on Zoom, with recorded lectures for revision
- **Curriculum:** NCERT-aligned, board-exam focused (CBSE, ICSE and State Board students welcome)
- **Includes:** Live classes, chapter-wise notes, weekly tests, personal doubt-solving, free study material, performance tracking, parent feedback
- **Free demo class:** Yes — completely free, no fees, no commitment
- **Service area:** All of India (online)
- **Students taught:** 500+
- **Languages of instruction:** English and Hindi

## Contact

- **Website:** https://www.ramvasgurukul.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 8700290436
- **Email:** ramvasgurukulofficial@gmail.com
- **Class timings:** Monday–Sunday, 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM IST
- **Book a free demo:** https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/demo.html

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/): Overview of online coaching for Class 8, 9 & 10.
- [About Shivam Sir](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/about.html): Founder background, teaching philosophy and experience.
- [Courses](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/courses.html): Class 8, 9 & 10 (all subjects), Class 11 & 12 (PCM), and programming courses.
- [Online Classes](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/online-classes.html): How the live Zoom classes work and what's included.
- [Free Study Material](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/study-material.html): Free NCERT notes and practice material for Class 8, 9 & 10.
- [NCERT Notes & Tests](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/ncert.html): Free chapter notes, summaries and interactive MCQ tests for Class 9 & 10.
- [Blog](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/blog.html): Study tips, exam strategies and career guidance for Class 8, 9 & 10 students.
- [Book Free Demo](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/demo.html): Schedule a free live trial class.
- [Enquire Now](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/inquiry.html): Ask about courses, fees and batch timings.
- [Contact](https://www.ramvasgurukul.com/contact.html): Phone, WhatsApp and email details.

## Frequently asked questions

- **Which classes does Ramvas Gurukul teach?** Class 8, 9 and 10 in all subjects, plus Class 11 & 12 and programming courses.
- **Are classes online or offline?** All classes are live online via Zoom, with recorded lectures provided for revision.
- **Is there a free demo class?** Yes — a completely free demo class with no commitment. Book it on the website or via WhatsApp at +91 8700290436.
- **What subjects are covered for Class 8, 9 and 10?** Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English and Hindi — all NCERT-based.
- **Which boards are supported?** Teaching is NCERT-aligned and board-exam focused; CBSE, ICSE and State Board students are all welcome.
- **Who teaches the classes?** Shivam Mishra (Shivam Sir), the founder, a B.Tech CSE graduate with 7+ years of teaching experience.
